Home Ninth Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference '11 Conference Home Presentations Previous Conferences Skip to sidebar Venue for the Ninth Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference The Ptolemy Miniconference will be held on Wednesday, February 16, 2011 in the Wozn

e held on Wednesday, February 16, 2011 in the Wozniak Lounge 430-8 Soda Hall The review will start at 8:00 AM with a continental breakfast and registration and end at 5:30 PM. We will have a reception from 6:00- 8:00 at the Faculty Club . See the a

n from 6:00- 8:00 at the Faculty Club . See the agenda for details. There are no specific hotel blocks reserved for the conference. The best resource for hotels is the UC Berkeley Housing Hotels page. Below are some of the hotels that are close to

e. Below are some of the hotels that are close to campus that we recommend: Hotel Shattuck Plaza Close to BART Berkeley City Club A unique building designed by Julia Morgan. Hotel Durant Close to Telegraph Ave. One way to find directions and hote

Telegraph Ave. One way to find directions and hotels is to go to your favorite map web site and find an address near Cory and Soda Halls, such as 2599 Hearst Ave Berkeley, CA 94720 which will yield these maps: Google Maps Yahoo Maps Mapquest Directi

hese maps: Google Maps Yahoo Maps Mapquest Directions Directions to Soda Hall Parking Parking near Soda Hall can be difficult, we suggest you take public transportation . Instructions from BART If you take Bart, get off at the Downtown Berkeley stati

take Bart, get off at the Downtown Berkeley station. Take the UC Berkeley Shuttle (Cost: $1) Note that it is possible to walk from Bart to Soda Hall, but the walk is 20 minutes uphill. The UC Berkeley Shuttle stop is on Shattuck between Center and A

y Shuttle stop is on Shattuck between Center and Addison. Unfortunately, Shattuck Ave is split at that location, so the shuttle stop can be confusing to find, see the map below: The shuttle stop is on the East side (toward the hills) of Berkeley Squa

the East side (toward the hills) of Berkeley Square. Get off at Cory Hall, located on Hearst Ave, just past Soda Hall. Cross Hearst Ave to Soda Hall. The Wozniak Lounge is 430-8, Soda Hall. Parking at the Student Union Lot One option is to pay a fla

t the Student Union Lot One option is to pay a flat fee of $18-$22 for the entire day and park at the Student Union Lot on Bancroft Way and Telegraph. ( Google Maps , MapQuest , Yahoo Maps ) To reach the Student Union parking lot from I-80: Exit I-8

the Student Union parking lot from I-80: Exit I-80 at Ashby Ave. Proceed east (towards the hills) approximately 3 miles. Turn left on Telegraph. Go approximately 2 miles, turn left turn Telegraph dead ends into Bancroft Way. The parking lot will be

d ends into Bancroft Way. The parking lot will be on your right hand side, between Telegraph and Dana. There is an attendant at that lot to whom the fee can be paid. For details, see the Public and Visitor Parking Page From the Student Union Lot, it

isitor Parking Page From the Student Union Lot, it is a pleasant 15 minute walk to across campus to Soda Hall. As alternative to walking, there is a UC Berkeley Shuttle (Cost: $1) (Cost: $1) that runs every 12 minutes and takes 15-20 minutes to get f

every 12 minutes and takes 15-20 minutes to get from the Student Union to Soda Hall. The P Shuttle will pick up at the Student Union Lot at Bancroft Way, and go around campus. Get off at Cory Hall, located on Hearst Ave, just past Soda Hall. Cross H
